title: populus purdomii var. rockii
intro: Populus purdomii var. rockii, also known as Rockii Poplar, is a variety of the Populus purdomii tree, native to China. The Populus purdomii var. rockii is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Populus purdomii var. rockii typically involve the bark or leaves being dried and made into tea, capsules, or infusions for medicinal use.
